# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Enhancements: smarter help without leaving the game
- Summary: Highlight improvements to the AI assistant integration, model switching, and a more persistent chat experience within CodeGrind to boost problem-solving flow.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-enhancements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-enhancements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-24-codegrind-ai-assistant-enhancements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now offers enhanced Azure OpenAI assistant capabilities, including multiple model support, resilient chat, and smoother problem-solving guidance directly in the coding workspace. This makes getting help faster without losing context in the editor.
- CTA: Try the updated AI assistant in your next practice session and share feedback on model switching and chat persistence.
- Visual brief: Static UI-focused image showing the CodeGrind editor with an AI chat panel, model-switch toggle, and problem-solving hints overlaying the coding workspace; cyberpunk-inspired, clean, and legible.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
